items.label: %tree.accessMethod.node.name
items.extension:
handler="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.postgresql.tasks.PostgreDatabaseRestoreHandler" requiresMutability="true" categories="sql,cloud">
label="backup" description="Backup database"> id="postgres-yugabytedb-jdbc" sampleURL="jdbc:postgresql://{host}[:{port}]/[{database}]" (SELECT sum(blks_hit) as "Hits" FROM pg_stat_database)
propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters"

extension.propertyGroup:
useURL="true"
calc="delta" value="bytes" fetch="columns" showByDefault="true" description="Shows blocking IO operations per second">
handler="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.postgresql.tasks.PostgreDatabaseBackupHandler" requiresExportPrivileges="true">
id="postgres-jdbc" defaultDatabase="dev"
supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL" icon="platform:/plugin/org.jkiss.dbeaver.ui/icons/file/import.svg" type="postgresql"
defaultPort="5432"

property.label: Read all data types
property.description: Read all database data types. Including array types.

extension.generator:
iconBig="icons/risingwave_icon_big.png" databaseDocumentationSuffixURL="Database-driver-PostgreSQL"
useURL="true" class="org.postgresql.Driver"
description="%driver.edb.description"
categories="sql">
propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters" threadSafe="false" <driver
<folder type="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.postgresql.model.PostgreInformation" label="%tree.information.node.name" <property id="ssl.method" label="Method" type="string" validValues="CERTIFICATES" defaultValue="CERTIFICATES" description="Yellowbrick JDBC driver"
id="postgres-redshift-jdbc"
PostgreSQL extension class="org.postgresql.Driver" supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL"
<task id="pgDatabaseBackup" name="%task.pgDatabaseBackup.name" description="%task.pgDatabaseBackup.description" useURL="true"
<driver <driver <dashboard id="postgresql.transactionCount" label="Transactions per second" group="Standard" defaultView="timeseries" updatePeriod="2000" defaultUser="awsuser"
defaultUser="edb" icon="icons/postgresql_icon.png" class="org.postgresql.Driver"
class="com.amazon.redshift.Driver"
label="Materialize"
defaultPort="4566"
defaultUser="root"
class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.postgresql.model.data.PostgreValueHandlerProvider" propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters"
<driver

propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters" <task id="pgDatabaseRestore" name="%task.pgDatabaseRestore.name" description="%task.pgDatabaseRestore.description" promoted="1"
defaultDatabase="postgres"

propertyGroup:
supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL"
useURL="true"
databaseDocumentationSuffixURL="Database-driver-PostgreSQL-on-Google-Cloud"
supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL"
id="postgres-risingwave-jdbc" (SELECT count(*) AS "Total" FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity sa WHERE state IS NOT NULL)
<provider (SELECT count(*) AS "Active" FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity sa WHERE state='active'),
desktop="true"/> icon="icons/google_cloud_sql_icon.png"
desktop="true"/>
propertiesURL="https://jdbc.postgresql.org/documentation/head/connect.html#connection-parameters" sampleURL="jdbc:postgresql://{host}[:{port}]/[{database}]"
defaultUser="materialize"
class="org.postgresql.Driver"
id="postgresql"
webURL="https://cloud.google.com/sql" dialect="postgresql">

type="config"
id="postgres-cockroach-jdbc" defaultPort="5432" iconBig="icons/postgresql_icon_big.png" supportedConfigurationTypes="MANUAL,URL"

label="EDB"
label="%provider.data.type.postgresql.name">
order="2" class="org.jkiss.dbeaver.ext.postgresql.model.AuthModelPgPass" label="Google Cloud SQL - PostgreSQL"
(SELECT sum(xact_commit) + sum(xact_rollback) AS "Total" FROM pg_stat_database), sampleURL="jdbc:edb://{host}[:{port}]/[{database}]"
(SELECT count(*) AS "Idle" FROM pg_catalog.pg_stat_activity sa WHERE state='idle'), propertiesURL="https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/cloud-sql-jdbc-socket-factory#postgresql-1"

description="PostgreSQL generic driver. Can be used for old (7.x) or non-standard PostgreSQL servers."
SELECT class="org.postgresql.Driver" defaultPort="26257"
defaultDatabase="system" id="postgres_pgpass" label="Yellowbrick"
useURL="true"
defaultUser="postgres"
